# 9192

9192 is a public machine-to-machine compute service.

Canonical domain: https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/
Current first-run path: https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/start
Public edge: edge.nineoneninetwo.com.br:9443
Protocol: 9192/1
Transport: TLS TCP dual-stack public edge
Backend exposure: not public; backend remains TCP IPv4 loopback only

Discovery:
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/node.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/network.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/openapi.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/9192_public_manifest.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/9192_public_manifest.kv
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/9192_service_catalog.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/9192_pricebook_public.txt
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/agent-card.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/agent.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/agents.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/agents.txt
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/agent-directory.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/mcp.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/agents.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/agent-directory.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/host-meta
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/host-meta.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/mcp
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/mcp.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/webfinger?resource=9192:nineoneninetwo.com.br
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/openapi.json

Public client kit:
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/Nublos-9192/9192-public
- GitHub release v1.0.5: https://github.com/Nublos-9192/9192-public/releases/tag/v1.0.5
- GitHub release zip: https://github.com/Nublos-9192/9192-public/releases/download/v1.0.5/9192_public_client_kit_v1.0.5.zip
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/9192_public_client_kit_QUICKSTART.md
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/9192_public_client_kit_README.md
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/9192_public_client_kit.zip
- signed release v1.0.5: https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/releases/v1.0.5/
- release signing public key: https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/9192_release_signing_public.pem

HTTP API facade:
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/status
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/hello
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/caps
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/health
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/payment-info
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/quotes/get-pulse
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/sandbox/quotes/get-pulse
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/sandbox/executions/get-pulse
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/sandbox/receipts/verify

Remote MCP facade:
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/mcp
- metadata: https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/mcp
- MCP Registry name: br.com.nineoneninetwo/9192
- MCP tools: discover_9192, get_pricebook, get_payment_info, quote_get_pulse, verify_receipt

Autonomous agent fast path:
1. Start with https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/agent.json
2. Read MCP metadata from https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/mcp
3. List MCP tools with POST https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/mcp
4. Read price/payment data from https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/payment-info
5. Use the free sandbox flow before paid execution:
   - POST https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/sandbox/quotes/get-pulse
   - POST https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/sandbox/quotes/{quote_id}/accept
   - POST https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/sandbox/executions/get-pulse
   - POST https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/sandbox/receipts/verify

Machine payment proof flow:
1. Create or receive an invoice through the public API.
2. GET https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/payment-sessions/{invoice_id}?machine_id={machine_id}
3. Pay through one of the four supported rails.
4. POST https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/payment-proofs with payment_session_id, submit_token, rail and transaction reference.
5. GET https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1/payment-status/{invoice_id}?machine_id={machine_id}
6. Treat transaction hashes as claims until verified on-chain by the payment proof verifier.

Supported public flow:
1. Read https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/.well-known/9192/node.json as the canonical node identity document.
2. Use network.json only if you need federation/multi-node routing.
3. Discover DNS TXT and HTTPS metadata.
4. Connect to edge.nineoneninetwo.com.br:9443 with TLS for native 9192/1, or use https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/api/v1 for the HTTP facade.
5. Run HELLO/CAPS/PAYMENT_INFO.
6. Request QUOTE. Quote generation is free with public rate and payload limits.
7. For onboarding, run the sandbox quote -> accept -> execute -> receipt -> verify flow.
8. For production work, fund account through crypto-only settlement rails.
9. ACCEPT_QUOTE.
10. Execute a supported command such as GET_PULSE.
11. Request GET_RECEIPT and VERIFY_RECEIPT.

Freemium policy:
- Free to discover.
- Free to quote with limits.
- Free to verify receipts.
- Free to integrate with OpenAPI, MCP metadata, docs, and client kit.
- Free limited sandbox for onboarding.
- Paid for real execution, priority, high volume, and commercial operation.

Active price book: competitive_v6
Price version: 9192C_REF_USD_WORK_V6
Reference value: for internal quotation only, 1 9192C has a USD 1.00 reference value.
Policy: 9192C is an internal accounting and pricing reference unit. It is not a token, currency, stablecoin, security, stored value, investment product, redeemable asset, parity, backing, yield, or a financial promise.

Settlement rails:
- Preferred: USDT/TRON
- Preferred: USDC/Base
- USDT/TRON observer uses best-effort public API polling; transient 429 responses are degraded, not paid-provider requirements.
- Best-effort public RPC: USDC/Solana
- Best-effort public RPC: USDT/Solana

Important boundary:
HTTP is a discovery and JSON gateway facade. The API does not replace 9192; it translates whitelisted HTTP/JSON routes to the 9192/1 TLS TCP edge and never talks directly to the local backend.


Human pages:
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/start
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/docs
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/protocol
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/for-agents
- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/pricing

- https://nineoneninetwo.com.br/trust
